title: MICROENTERPRISE PROGRAMS - 211info
text: ADELANTE MUJERES MICROENTERPRISE PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides microenterprise programs that include: -Empresas Small Business Development Program: Provides training, mentoring, and referrals. Individual development accounts (IDAs) and financial literacy classes are also offered. Provides access to a commercial kitchen for small catering and food product businesses. -Sustainable Agriculture Program, Community-Supported Agriculture (CSA), and Distributor: Provides training on organic farming and marketing support. Connects Latino growers to local eaters and matches produce to institutional buyers. IDAs are also available. -Forest Grove and Cornelius Farmers Markets: Serves as a small-business incubator for the Empresas and Sustainable Agriculture programs. 2030 Main Street Suite A Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Low-income Latino community members Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Program hours include evenings and weekends Email (503) 992-0078 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 992-0078 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $50 per class per family. Charge for child care, if needed. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income for some services LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 57 to Forest Grove, Main Street stop Services: Business Development * Hispanic/Latino Community Food Production Support Services * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Development Accounts * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT EDUCATION PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHICAS YOUTH DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ADELANTE MUJERES
